title: Crispy Spicy Greek Tofu Skewers
description: A fiery, plantbased Greek-inspired dish featuring tofu coated in a ground poppy seed crunch and finished under a broiler for a satisfying bite.

ingredients.name: Cornstarch
ingredients.notes: Lightly dust tofu to help crisp

instructions: Press tofu between paper towels for 15 minutes to remove excess moisture.
Whisk lemon juice, olive oil, oregano, red pepper flakes, salt, pepper, and ground poppy seeds to make a quick marinade.
Toss tofu cubes in the marinade and let sit for 15 minutes to absorb flavors.
Preheat oven to 450°F (232°C) and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Remove tofu, pat dry, and lightly roll each cube in cornstarch until evenly coated.
Thread tofu onto skewers, spacing pieces evenly.
Place skewers on the prepared baking sheet and bake for 15 minutes, then flip and bake another 10 minutes until golden and crispy.
Optional: switch to broil mode for 2–3 minutes to intensify crispness and add a golden finish.
Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving with a side of tzatziki or a dairy‑free yogurt alternative.
